title: eriophorum gracile
intro: Eriophorum gracile, also known as the small cotton grass or small cotton sedge, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Eriophorum gracile include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe sore throats, and promote the removal of mucus from the lungs. In herbal preparations, Eriophorum gracile is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in combination with other herbs to create remedies for respiratory issues and coughs.
